calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Jan-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Miriam Hiser, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ANGELA LAM, sworn and examined,
No appearance by defaulted defendants AUDELLIA SANDATE RAMIREZ and DELIA SANDATE,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $54,999.75
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3849.98
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $735.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $59,584.73

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-07-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Continued To Dec-14-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
